dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, things are worse than before. Your efforts to {quest_action} helped, but the {quest_threat} struck again and undid much of our progress.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reports that the {quest_focus} {quest_focus_is} under renewed pressure. The {enemy_type} are taking advantage of the chaos {location_hint}. We need to deal with them while shoring up what is left of the {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.outro: We are fighting on two fronts: nature and creatures. We need you now more than ever.

dialogueChunks.intro: More trouble, {player_name}. Since you started to {quest_action}, we discovered that the {quest_threat} caused more damage than we realized.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_is} compromised and the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} at risk of total loss. {quest_ally} found that {enemy_type} have nested in the wreckage {location_hint}. We need to clear them out and recover any {quest_item} before it is too late.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we lose the {quest_stakes}, there is nothing left to rebuild.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, an aftershock of the {quest_threat} hit while you were working to {quest_action}. {quest_ally} was nearly caught in it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The area around the {quest_focus} is now crawling with displaced {enemy_type} {location_hint}. People cannot get close enough to continue repairs. Someone needs to secure the perimeter and salvage what {quest_item} remain.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} hanging by a thread. We need the area safe before we can save anything.
